miraX Components

miraX is organized around several core components that support visualization, data access, modeling and analysis.

Select a component below to access detailed documentation, available datasets, tools and examples.

Component Description See Also
Base Maps Background cartographic layers for spatial context Layers
Networks Real-time and historical monitoring networks Models
Layers Raster and vector geospatial datasets User Layers
User Layers User-created and imported data Toolbar
Models Simulation and analytical tools Networks
Toolbar Interactive map tools and utilities Layers

Component Overview

Base Maps

Provide map backgrounds such as satellite imagery, terrain and reference maps.

→ Explore available basemaps

Networks

Access environmental observation networks, stations and time series.

→ Explore available networks

Layers

Visualize project data through raster, vector and thematic layers.

→ Explore layers

User Layers

Create and manage your own spatial data.

→ Explore user layers

Models

Run simulations and analysis tools.

→ Explore models

Toolbar

Access measurement, drawing and analysis tools.

→ Explore tools

Related Documentation

  • Map Viewer
  • Time Series Dashboards
  • Project Manager
